security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://*.google.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com data: blob:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.google.com https://*.googleapis.com; frame-src https://*.google.com https://*.google.es;
